texto: We must accept the idea that having a male child has a unique social and psychological meaning for a woman. Even women who led the movement to break out the passivity and sublimation of the female role were deeply influenced by the belief in superior masculine power.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Klein Carole sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “We must accept the idea that having a male child has a unique social and psychological meaning fo…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, motherhood, son, útil em momentos de son e women.
